author: Konstantina K.
pros: Hotelwize is an impressive solution for the creation of hotel websites. Having a long experience in dealing with companies for our hotel's web presence, we have tried both DIY wesbite builders and local freelancers. Hotelwize offers the best value-for-money result in terms of aesthetics, performance and client sercvice! We just chose the design that we preferred and the content that we wanted to add and they created our new website in one week! I highly recommend them!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
